sentence: 学校的南侧有一个停车场。
pinyin: Xuéxiào de nán cè yǒu yī gè tíngchēchǎng.
english: There is a parking lot on the south side of the school.

sentence: 新国王举行了隆重的登基仪式。
pinyin: Xīn guówáng jǔxíng le lóngzhòng de dēngjī yíshì.
english: The new king held a grand coronation ceremony.

sentence: 小国家不应该屈服于强权压力。
pinyin: Xiǎo guójiā bù yīnggāi qūfú yú qiángquán yālì.
english: Small countries should not yield to the pressure of powerful nations.

sentence: 在正式场合要用正确的称谓。
pinyin: Zài zhèngshì chǎnghé yào yòng zhèngquè de chēngwèi.
english: In formal settings, you should use the correct form of address.

sentence: 这双鞋的鞋底是塑胶做的。
pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié de xiédǐ shì sùjiāo zuò de.
english: The sole of this pair of shoes is made of plastic.
